samples.prompt: Once upon a time, there was a little girl named Lily who
samples.generated_text:
loved to play with her toys. One day, she found a big, red ball in her room. She was so happy and wanted to play with it all day.
Lily took the ball outside to the park. She saw a boy named Tom playing with a toy car. Tom was playing with the car when he accidentally dropped it. Lily was very sad and started to cry. Tom felt bad and wanted to help Lily.
Tom said, "Don't cry, Lily. I will help you." He picked up the ball and gave it back to Lily. She was so happy and thanked Tom. They played with the ball together and had lots of fun. From that day on, Lily and Tom became best friends, and they always played with the red ball.

samples.prompt: Once upon a time, there was a little girl named Lily who
samples.generated_text:
loved to play with her toys. One day, she found a pretty crystal in her toy box. It was shiny and sparkly, and she wanted to show it to her best friend, Tom.
Lily went to Tom's house and said, "Tom, look what I found! It's so pretty!" Tom looked at the crystal and said, "Wow, it's so shiny and pretty! Let's play with it!" They took the crystal outside and started to play with it.
As they played, a big wind came and blew the crystal away. Lily and Tom were sad. They looked everywhere for the crystal, but they could not find it. Then, they saw a big dog with the crystal in its mouth. The dog had the crystal in its mouth!
Lily and Tom were so happy to have the crystal back. They played with the dog and had a lot of fun. They knew they could always count on each other to solve any problem. And they played with the crystal all day long, happy and excited.
<|endoftext|>
